title: Coverage Thresholds and Coverage Honesty

coverage.description: Agents evolved through governed patch execution

coverage_scope_analysis.per_agent_case_type: Each agent (umbrella, clothing, planning) has test coverage for positive, boundary, malformed, missing, and contradiction cases across fixture files. Agent-level test suites cover all 15 fixture scenarios per agent.
coverage_scope_analysis.governance_layer_coverage: All governance layer paths (proposal, risk, policy, patch, validation, promotion, evidence) have at least one positive and one negative test. 14 validator functions tested.
coverage_scope_analysis.schema_coverage: All 9 infrastructure schemas have valid and invalid fixture tests in test_evidence_schema_validation.py.
coverage_scope_analysis.command_target_coverage: All 23 primary Makefile targets (P2-C001 to P2-C023) linked to assertions via target_id annotations.
coverage_scope_analysis.acceptance_claim_coverage: All 11 acceptance claims from reconciliation report are covered by test or evidence artifact.

note: Coverage expanded beyond 7 requirements to include per-agent case-type analysis, governance layer coverage, schema coverage, command target coverage, and claim coverage. No uncovered requirements remain.
